@@ -46,6 +46,8 @@ add_message_files(
   DIRECTORY msg

   Marker.msg

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# The distortion parameters, size depending on the distortion model.
+# For "plumb_bob", the 5 parameters are: (k1, k2, t1, t2, k3).
+float64[] cameraD
+
+# Intrinsic camera matrix for the raw (distorted) images.
+#     [fx  0 cx]
+# K = [ 0 fy cy]
+#     [ 0  0  1]
+# Projects 3D points in the camera coordinate frame to 2D pixel
+# coordinates using the focal lengths (fx, fy) and principal point
+# (cx, cy).
+float64[9]  cameraK # 3x3 row-major matrix
+
+# possible ids of the detected fiducial (empty if no id could be identified)
+int32[] ids
+
+# confidence of the possible ids in [0, 1]
+float64[] ids_confidence
+
+# Array of object points in the object coordinate space.
+geometry_msgs/Point[] objectPoints
+
+# Array of corresponding image points. Point.z is not used.
+geometry_msgs/Point[] imagePoints

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# An array of marker candidates with a header for global reference.
+
+Header header
+MarkerCandidate[] markers     #  array of marker candidates
+

data.author: mmacsek
data.message: Added support of multiple ids with confidence

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 # This expresses a marker/fiducial in a 3D space
-uint32 id                    # id of the detected fiducial (0 if id could not be identified)
-geometry_msgs/Pose pose      # pose of the detected marker/fiducial
\ No newline at end of file
+int32[] ids                  # possible ids of the detected fiducial (empty if no id could be identified)
+float64[] ids_confidence     # confidence of the possible ids in [0, 1]
+geometry_msgs/Pose pose      # pose of the detected marker/fiducial
